title: Sonipat Heat Wave
lead: Sonipat is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.37. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sonipat has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 21.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 22%, and wind speed is at 16.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions. 
 The city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe during this critical period.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
